scene.message: Elly: !! It's coming from{nl} inside the school building!{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: That fiend! What's she{nl} doing inside the school?!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Toro? Ms. Natsumi?!{waitkey}No...{wait_fr:30} this can't be......{waitkey}{ret}
Student's Spirit: At least you{nl} all, escape with your lives!!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: E-{wait_fr:30}escape, you say,{nl} but how are we supposed to?{waitkey}{ret}
